---
title: "test_main_loop.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/contracts/test_main_loop.py"
loc: 74
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 5.72
overall_score: 5.40
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestRepoSpokeSkipsDirty, test_dirty_repo_returns_false.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestRepoSpokeSkipsDirty and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 28 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.main_loop](file://src.sentinel.main_loop)
- [src.sentinel.repo_spoke](file://src.sentinel.repo_spoke)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)

### Exports
- `TestRepoSpokeSkipsDirty`
- `test_dirty_repo_returns_false`
- `TestRepoSpokeCommitsOnChange`
- `test_commit_on_change`
- `test_no_commit_when_no_change`
- `TestDaemonOrchestrator`
- `test_load_persona_defaults_to_odin`
- `test_load_persona_from_config`
- `test_load_target_repos_defaults_to_root`
